textByHash.87bf2db99d29ad1269caa8a2665644dd9c092ea0: Hello there. You look lost, are you okay?
textByHash.011de62d556554ca4604209e3a4156864f47271b: Ahh... the Stronghold of Security. It's down there.
textByHash.8429bb7ec422650e7f5d3108282f94e31597e4c2: Yeah... tell that to my brother, he still hasn't come back.
textByHash.6adf8db9a012e4432ea3c9c86c18cdce3099c714: He's an explorer too. When the miner fell down that hole he'd made and came back babbling about doors, questions and treasure, my brother went to explore. No-one has seen him since.
textByHash.a20f4bdce095dcf0d5d1d5848a129a9ebd082054: Lots of people have been down there, but none of them have seen him, Let me know if you do, will you?
textByHash.b27d544649e2b3c644b679ef902fb9ee92a983fb: Well done! You didn't happen to find my brother?
textByHash.21ce6f086d080b23a61ece9491a6be4757571d19: I sense bad news. It's okay, he's been gone so long. I believe I've moved on.
textByHash.3b3556ef09016d92234f3f3ac3640848a6f57f23: True, I will raise a drink for him tonight, he was a good man, even if he was a pacifist.
textByHash.3fb8439b51ba070f4290636e9743c30e9997e20a: I am glad the challenges of the stronghold have been overcome; it feels like my brother has somehow been avenged.
